data.description: Orezone will start trading on ASX with ticker symbol "ORE".

data.title: Imperial Metals Corp. reveals Q2 2025 financial results with earnings for the first half of the year.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 7th, 2025, Imperial Metals Corporation (known as "Imperial") (TSX:III) released its financial outcomes for the periods spanning three and six months ending on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Utilities in Indiana, Oregon, Utah, and Vermont offer cybersecurity teams amid attacks by China and Iran. Franklin launches new solution at DEF CON to protect U.S. water systems.
data.description: A new scalable cybersecurity solution has been introduced by Franklin from DEF CON amid the challenges faced by financially struggling utilities from China and Iran. The solution is already being implemented in Indiana, Oregon, Utah, and Vermont, where teams are offering cybersecurity services as a public initiative without any obligatory requirements or bureaucratic obstacles. The announcement was made during an event in Las Vegas on August 7, 2025.
TRUMP: LOOK FORWARD TO HOSTING PRESIDENT OF AZERBAIJAN, ILHAM ALIYEV, AND PRIME MINISTER OF ARMENIA, NIKOL PASHINYAN, AT WHITE HOUSE TOMORROW FOR A HISTORIC PEACE SUMMIT

data.title: Atlanticus reveals Q2 2025 financial performance.
data.description: A new report reveals that the global unemployment rate has reached 6.2%, with an estimated 170 million people without jobs worldwide. The youth unemployment rate is even higher, at 13.1%, affecting approximately 73 million individuals aged 15-24. The COVID-19 pandemic has played a significant role in these statistics, leading to widespread job losses across various industries. The report also highlights the disparities in unemployment rates across different regions, with some countries experiencing much higher rates than others. Experts are calling for immediate action to address this global unemployment crisis and prevent long-term economic repercussions.
DRC presidency spokesperson: ‘Important communication from the Presidency of the Republic regarding the government's exit’

data.title: Gartner IT Symposium/Xpo 2025 in Barcelona on Nov. 10-13, gathering 6,500 CIOs and IT executives to explore future of IT.
data.description: In November 2025, Gartner, Inc. will be hosting the Gartner IT Symposium/Xpo. This four-day event will take place at the International Barcelona Convention Center and is set to be the largest gathering of CIOs and IT executives worldwide. With over 6,500 attendees expected, the event will provide a platform for exploring cutting-edge technologies, insights, and trends that are influencing the future of IT and business. The goal is to assist organizations in fast-tracking their technology strategies.

data.title: City Ventures opens Pinnacle townhome community in Milpitas, with over 70% sold. Grand Opening set for Aug 9. Join now!
data.description: City Ventures, the prominent builder of eco-friendly homes in California, is launching Pinnacle, a new townhome community in Milpitas, on Saturday, August 9th. Over 70% of the homes at Pinnacle have already been sold, highlighting the significant interest in this development. To cater to potential buyers, the company will hold a Grand Opening event featuring tours of two furnished model homes. This event is essential for those looking to become part of the thriving community.

data.title: Black Diamond Group reports Q2 2025 results, with a dividend declared. Operating & financial results for Q2 compared to last year.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on August 7, 2025, Black Diamond Group Limited, a prominent supplier of space rental and workforce accommodation services, disclosed its operational and financial outcomes for the three and six-month period finishing on June 30, 2025, in contrast to the same period concluding on June 30, 2024. The company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbols TSX:BDI and on the OTCQX as BDIMF. All monetary values are presented in Canadian dollars.

data.title: Bluejay Diagnostics reports Q2 financial results, updates on Symphony IL-6 test program. $BJDX
data.description: Acton, Massachusetts - On August 7, 2025, Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: BJDX), a company specializing in medical diagnostics for critical care, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. Additionally, the company offered insights into its Symphony IL-6 test initiative and highlighted significant operational achievements.

data.title: Conifex Timber Inc. to release Q2 2025 results on Aug 14, 2025, with conference call scheduled at 8:00 AM PT / 11:00 AM ET. TSX: CFF. Participate by dialing in.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC - On August 7, 2025, Conifex Timber Inc. (TSX: CFF) stated its intent to unveil its Q2 2025 results prior to market opening on Thursday, August 14, 2025. The company has set a conference call for 8:00 AM Pacific Time/11:00 AM Eastern Time on the same day to review its financial performance. To join the call, dial the following numbers:

data.title: Black Hat launches Global Startup Spotlight Competition for emerging technologies at Black Hat USA 2026, aiming for increased investment.
data.description: In San Francisco, the renowned cybersecurity event series Black Hat has introduced the Global Startup Spotlight Competition. This initiative goes beyond the typical Startup Spotlight Competition at Black Hat events, acknowledging the demand for more support in emerging technologies. The program will run throughout Black Hat USA 2026 and the months leading up to the event, aiming to bring together the most promising startups in the cybersecurity industry.

data.title: ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) elected all nominee directors at virtual Annual Meeting of Shareholders on August 7, 2025.
data.description: In Cambridge, Ontario, ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) disclosed that during the virtual Annual Meeting of Shareholders on August 7, 2025, all nominee directors outlined in the Management Information Circular from June 18, 2025, including the July 8, 2025 Addendum, were successfully elected. The electronic vote resulted in the re-election of the directors to the ATS board.

data.title: Ready Capital Corp reported Q2 2025 GAAP loss per share of $(0.31), distributable loss per share of $(0.14), and distributable loss per share before realized losses of $(0.10).
data.description: The loss per common share from continuing operations based on GAAP is at $0.31, while the distributable loss per common share stands at $0.14. Additionally, before realized losses, the distributable loss per common share is reported at $0.10.

data.title: Inovalis REIT released Q2 2025 financial results in Toronto. Find details in MD&A on their website.
data.description: In Toronto, Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: INO.UN) announced its financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The unaudited Consolidated Financial Statements and Management’s Discussion and Analysis for Q2 2025 can be accessed on the REIT’s website (www.inovalisreit.com) and at www.sedarplus.ca. All figures, except rental rates, square footage, and per unit amounts, are displayed in thousands of Canadian dollars or Euros. For detailed financial information, visit the specified websites.

data.title: Hampton Financial Corp. finishes non-brokered private placement of debentures.
data.description: Authorities have reported a significant increase in COVID-19 cases in the past week, with over 10,000 new cases and 150 deaths. This surge has prompted officials to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. The total number of cases in the region now stands at more than 50,000, with a death toll exceeding 800. Hospitals are operating at full capacity, and healthcare workers are facing immense pressure. The public is urged to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to mitigate the impact of the ongoing crisis.
Justin Osborne tenders resignation as non-executive director

data.title: Teen driver insurance rates are rising significantly, as per new analysis by CheapInsurance.com. Parents need to prepare for this as back-to-school season approaches. Los Angeles, Aug. 7, 2025. #InsuranceHike
data.description: A recent study conducted by CheapInsurance.com has identified specific strategies to save money as families nationwide gear up for the upcoming back-to-school season. With the analysis offering a breakdown of key information by state, it sheds light on the financial challenges that parents of teenage drivers might encounter. Released on August 7, 2025, the findings provide crucial insights for families across the country, highlighting the need for cost-effective approaches as they navigate this period. The comprehensive report aims to assist parents in managing expenses associated with their teen drivers during the busy back-to-school period.
Pam Bondi: ‘Today, and are announcing a $50 MILLION REWARD for information leading to the arrest of Nicolás Maduro.’

data.title: RioCan reports strong Q2 results with 9.3% FFO growth to $0.47 per unit; achieved 51.5% new leasing spreads. Closed 4 Living assets sales.
data.description: In Toronto, RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: REI.UN) unveiled its financial performance for the periods ending June 30, 2025. Notably, there was a significant increase in FFO per unit by 9.3%, reaching $0.47. The Trust capitalized on market opportunities, resulting in new leasing spreads of 51.5% and blended leasing spreads of 20.6%. Additionally, RioCan closed four firm sales of RioCan Living™ assets, bringing the total dispositions to five for the year.
